body:
add `fieldcontourf` and `fieldheatmap` plots

This should be helpful for @akshaysridhar's topography work, as it plots the values directly avoiding unnecessary interpolation.

![extruded_topology](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1692009/220784926-f88ee3c9-4d81-4283-b52c-5241ce19c6f7.png)



- [ ] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [ ] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [ ] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [ ] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: ClimaCoreMakie support for extruded fields + topography
